_reservedChapterIdsDescription: PROJECT METADATA: This field is NOT enforced by validate_curriculum.js.
It tracks which legacy curriculum chapter IDs are still awaiting a completed Schema v2 replacement.
When a Schema v2 replacement chapter has passed the required audit process and been committed to the main branch, remove its legacy ID from reservedChapterIds.
This field exists only to track migration progress during the Schema v2 curriculum rewrite.
It does NOT indicate which curriculum the application currently loads.
The live application continues using the legacy curriculum until the Phase F Atomic Cutover.
During Phase F the application will switch to renderer/lesson-data/chapters/, after which this field is expected to become obsolete and may be removed.
This list refers only to the 15 legacy curriculum chapters. It is not related to the numbering of the 34-chapter Schema v2 curriculum.
